name: USS Massey (DD 778)
events: 12 Dec 1944 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) departed from Seattle bound for San Diego.
13 Feb 1945 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) departed from Bremerton bound for Pearl Harbor.
21 Mar 1945 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) arrived at Ulithi.
1 Apr 1945 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) departed from Ulithi to participate in the Okinawa campaign.
24 Jun 1945 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) departed from the Okinawa area bound for San Pedro Bay, Philippines.
16 Jul 1945 USS Massey (Cdr. C.W. Aldrich) arrived back in the Okinawa area.
